economic_notes: Nation has three GBEs: N'Quatqua Logging Co. Ltd., N'Quatqua Fisheries Inc., and N'Quatqua Employment & Economic Development Corporation (all 100% owned). GBE financials not available and not consolidated; audit qualified as a result. St'at'imc Authority settlement with BC and BC Hydro (2011) provides annual trust distributions to N'Quatqua.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) GBE financial information not available and not consolidated for N'Quatqua Logging Co. Ltd., N'Quatqua Fisheries Inc., and N'Quatqua Employment & Economic Development Corporation; (2) allowance for bad debts on band member receivables of $307,121 (of which $279,787 significantly overdue) may be understated as only $56,089 allowance recorded. No budget presented. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($3,152,727) + FNHA ($257,872) + Government of Canada ($152,992) + Province of BC ($2,521,865) + CMHC ($27,349) + FNESC ($126,078) + New Relationship Trust ($260,000) = $6,548,283 (rounded to $6,548,276 per rounding in lines); osr = total revenue minus government transfers. Large prior-year Province of BC revenue ($9,598,958) and Social Housing expenses ($5,639,708) due to contracts; 2024 figures substantially lower. Change in deferred revenue line ($1,702,984) is a significant revenue recognition item. St'at'imc and Ottawa Trust funds held on balance sheet as financial assets.
